summary: Fresh /verify smoke passed: graph checks clean, tracked command inventory matches README, root AGENTS.md and /init hydration behavior verified, ignore rules verified, and no scoped command/memory/extension drift found.

Report actual changed files for comparison against the plan blast radius.

passedChecks.result: Tracked commands: brainstorm, close, create, init, npm-release, plan, pr, review, ship, verify. git status --short .omp/commands produced no paths.

passedChecks.expected: Exit 0 and print all runtime/Python bytecode paths as ignored.
Exit 1 because versioned bead sync output must not be ignored.
passedChecks.result: Exit 1 with no path output, matching the expected non-ignored state.

passedChecks.expected: README documents every tracked shipped command, including npm-release, and the command set equals the expected ten files.

Init hydration includes AGENTS.md handling and reuses project_name, verification command variables, replace_exact, and agent template helpers.

passedChecks.expected: No stale wording or unresolved known placeholder tokens remain in changed files.
passedChecks.result: Exit 0; each checked file printed an empty bad-token list.

passedChecks.expected: First run creates AGENTS.md, second run exits 0 and leaves AGENTS.md byte-identical with required headings present.
passedChecks.result: Exit 0; first run created AGENTS.md; second run reported AGENTS.md already populated; second_byte_identical True; missing_headings [].

passedChecks.result: Exit 0; /npm-release count 1; Nine slash commands present False; release helper wording present True.

No .omp/memory/project file is touched by this bead verification scope.
